title: arifOS Evidence Receipt
description: Canonical schema for an evidence receipt. Every claim in the federation must reference one. The receipt's evidence_level caps the claim's certainty. Forged 2026-06-02 18:41 UTC under F13 SOVEREIGN ratification.

claim_id.description: The claim this receipt supports. Multiple receipts may reference the same claim (corroboration).

evidence_type.description: How this evidence relates to its claim.

source_uri.description: Optional URI for retrieval. May be a hash, file path, or external URL.

timestamp.description: When the evidence was produced (ISO 8601 UTC).

ingested_at.description: When the kernel received the evidence (ISO 8601 UTC).

evidence_level.description: Where in the memory stack this evidence lives. Caps the certainty of the claim it supports.

actor_verified.description: Whether the actor that produced this evidence is verified. false here caps the claim at KERNEL_SEAL_AWARENESS.

actor_id.description: The actor that produced this evidence. null if anonymous.

context_verdict.description: The kernel's verdict on the context in which this evidence was produced.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the evidence content (if applicable).

ttl_seconds.description: How long this receipt remains valid, in seconds. null = perpetual.

expires_at.description: Absolute expiration time (ISO 8601 UTC). null = no expiration.

non_overclaim_check.description: Whether the kernel's non-overclaim check passed for this receipt. 'skipped' is allowed only for L0_HUMAN_DIRECT evidence.

notes.description: Optional human-readable note. Must not contain SEAL language without namespacing (see docs/VERDICT_SEMANTICS.md).
